reference: As you have taken an emergency contraceptive pill after sex, there is nothing to worry about. Moreover, you had sex during a safe period. You can take a urine pregnancy test to check if you are still anxious.
text: As you have taken an emergency contraceptive pill after sex, there is nothing to worry about. Moreover, you had sex during a safe period. You can take a urine pregnancy test to check. Are still anxious?
